carDetail.signInRequired: Sign in required to contact seller

seller.note: For your protection, all communication with this seller goes through our broker team. Direct contact information is not shared.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.platformBenefit: Buy and sell cars safely through our broker-protected platform. No direct contact between buyers and sellers.

buyCars.title: Find Your Perfect Car
buyCars.subtitle: Browse verified vehicles from trusted sellers
buyCars.searchPlaceholder: Search by make, model, or keyword

sellCars.title: Sell Your Car
sellCars.subtitle: List your vehicle on our trusted marketplace and let our brokers handle the rest
sellCars.ctaSubtext: Free to list. We only charge when you sell.
sellCars.step1Desc: Add photos, details, and set your price. Our team will review and optimize your listing.
sellCars.step2Desc: Our broker team markets your car and handles all inquiries from interested buyers.
sellCars.step3Desc: We verify buyers, handle negotiations, and ensure secure payment transfer.
sellCars.benefit1Desc: All sales are secured through our escrow system
sellCars.benefit2Desc: Our brokers handle all buyer communication
sellCars.benefit3Desc: Our experts help you price competitively
sellCars.benefit4Desc: Average listing time is just 14 days

meta.homeTitle: CarBroker - Buy Cars Safely Through Trusted Brokers
meta.homeDescription: Browse verified cars and purchase safely through our broker-protected platform. No direct buyer-seller contact.
meta.buyCarsDescription: Find your perfect car from our selection of verified vehicles. All purchases are broker-protected.
meta.sellCarsDescription: List your vehicle on our trusted marketplace. We handle buyer communication and ensure safe transactions.
meta.authDescription: Sign in to your CarBroker account to buy or sell cars safely.
